query:
SELECT pc.*, c.name as city_name, p.userId, u.name as user_name, u.phone
FROM partner_cities pc
JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
JOIN partners p ON pc.partnerId = p.id
JOIN users u ON p.userId = u.id
WHERE u.phone = '13800138013'
